meta_title: Joint Injections — Coming Soon | My Private Clinic — Fulwood, Preston
meta_description: Corticosteroid joint injections coming soon to My Private Clinic in Fulwood, Preston. Knee, shoulder, hip, elbow, ankle and wrist. Dr Faizal Secretary.
hero_sub: Corticosteroid injections for knee, shoulder, hip, elbow, ankle and wrist are coming to My Private Clinic. Fast-acting relief for joint pain and inflammation, administered by Dr Faizal Secretary.
intro_quote: Your joint pain is affecting your daily life. You need relief without a long wait.
intro_heading: Joint Injections in Preston — Coming Soon
intro_para_1: Corticosteroid joint injections offer fast-acting relief for joint pain and inflammation — knee, shoulder, hip, elbow, ankle and wrist.
intro_para_2: Administered by Dr Faizal Secretary, a fully qualified GP with clinical injection training. Launching Spring 2026.

faqs.question: Which joints can be injected?
faqs.answer: Knee, shoulder, hip, elbow, ankle and wrist — and other joints depending on clinical assessment.

faqs.question: When is this service launching?
faqs.answer: We are targeting Spring 2026. Register your interest to be notified when booking opens.

faqs.question: How do I register my interest?
faqs.answer: Call or WhatsApp us on 07424 172034 or email hello@myprivate.clinic.
